text:
Congratulations on your audit results! Here are your biggest wins:

1. **Structured Data: 98/100** - This is an excellent score, indicating that your site is well-optimized for AI visibility through structured data. This helps AI agents understand your content better.

2. **Entity Definitions: 88/100** - A strong score here means your site effectively defines entities, which enhances its relevance and visibility to AI.

These high scores reflect your solid foundation in AI visibility optimization. Keep up the great work! If you have any questions about improving other areas, like your FAQ coverage, feel free to ask!
